overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, starting under an elevated highway overpass, turning onto a waterfront promenade with neon-lit skyscrapers across the water, and crossing a street before continuing along the waterfront. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and detailed futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: turns right from under overpass to reveal open waterfront and neon-lit city skyline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the overpass, then turning right to face the waterfront

entered.detail: large rusted steel support beams of the elevated highway structure
green highway sign reading 'NC Ringroad E' suspended from the overpass
white rectangular sign with black text 'SPEED LIMIT 40' mounted on a pole
tall industrial street lamp with bright white light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway overpass with steel girders and road signs visible. The camera walks forward along a concrete sidewalk, then turns right around 8 seconds to reveal an expansive waterfront view with a neon-lit futuristic skyline in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade overlooking neon-lit business district

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade observing the illuminated skyscrapers and reflections on the water

entered.detail: dark waterway reflecting the city lights, separating the promenade from the downtown skyline
silver metal safety railing running along the edge of the waterfront
cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with bright neon advertisements and window lights
massive rectangular archway building framing the distant skyline
large airborne holographic billboard floating between buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open waterfront promenade with a metal railing on the right, the camera moves past the overpass structure revealing a stunning cyberpunk skyline across the water. Neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and a distinctive giant arch structure dominate the view while the water reflects the colorful city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk transitioning to waterfront path

events.description: turns left away from waterfront to approach pedestrian crosswalk
crosses the street at marked crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: turning inland to cross the street at a crosswalk, then returning to the waterfront path on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: walking across the crosswalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
vertical traffic signal showing red light for vehicles

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left toward a street crosswalk, temporarily turning away from the water to cross the road. After crossing alongside other pedestrians, it turns right to resume walking along the waterfront promenade, with the neon skyline now visible from a different angle across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadow of an industrial overpass into a vibrant, neon-lit waterfront vista. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway of steel girders and concrete, moving forward before turning right to reveal an expansive view of a futuristic skyline. As the camera advances along a promenade with a metal railing, the scene opens up to showcase towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and a giant arch reflecting colorful lights across the water. The perspective then shifts left to cross a street alongside other pedestrians, temporarily obscuring the view before turning right to resume the walk along the waterfront. Finally, the camera settles back into its path, capturing the glowing cyberpunk city from a new angle across the shimmering bay.
